NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-24-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE WRONG JESSE OROPEZA WAS SERVED WITH THE OEX. APPEARANCE BY JESSE OROPEZA(THE WRONG ONE). JUDGE: DOMALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-11-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREIDITOR ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2013; JUDGMENT DEBTOR JESSE OROPEZA FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT $500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SIGNED & SEALED (ORIGINAL) BENCH WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDER FORWARDED TO SHERIFF'S DEPT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY BUGGS, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT OROPEZA, JESSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-25-2013 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-15-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $200 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON MAY 15, 2013 AND ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT OF $7,700 IS PAID. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE AT JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S RESIDENCE BY MAIL", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON 4/11/13 IS WITHDRAWN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR REVIEW AS TO DEFENDANT OROPEZA, JESSE

WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED BY SHERIFF, UNSERVED, REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT MOVE. NO FOWARDING ADDRESS OR ADDITIONAL INFORMATION PROVIDED. ORIGINAL WARRANT RETURNED TO COURT AND PROOF OF SERVICE MAILED OUT. AS TO DEFENDANT OROPEZA, JESSE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-11-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT HE SERVED THE WRONG JESSE OROPEZA FOR THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION, NEEDS MORE TIME TO HAVE THE JESSE OROPEZA HE HAS JUDGMENT AGAINST SERVED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S.
